name: Attack Guidance Armor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>攻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>誘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アーマー
desc:
When a monster declares an attack: Activate 1 of these effects;
● Destroy the attacking monster.
● Target 1 monster on either field, except the attacking monster; change the attack target to it and perform damage calculation.
You can only activate 1 "Attack Guidance Armor" per turn.

attack: Conducts battle between your opponent's monsters
